name: amazon-listing
description: Write a fully optimized Amazon product listing with a keyword-rich title, five benefit-focused bullet points, and a detailed product description.
input_description: Product name, category, key features and dimensions, target customer, primary and secondary keywords, and any compliance or safety certifications.
output_description: Complete Amazon listing in Markdown: optimized title (under 200 characters), 5 bullet points (each under 200 characters), backend keyword suggestions, and a 300-word A+ product description.
